content.speakerText: What’s one thing you miss most about your hometown?
content.speakerTextCn: 你最想念家乡的哪一件事？
expectedAnswers: The morning dim sum at the corner shop — nothing compares!
The way the rain sounds on the old rooftops — it’s so soothing.
The annual lantern festival. I haven’t found anything like it here.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应了‘miss’的情感需求，表达怀旧
语言准确性：使用了恰当的比较结构（nothing compares, like it here）
表达自然度：使用了感官描述（sounds, soothing）和感叹语气增强感染力
关键词覆盖：包含具体事物+情感反应，体现文化细节

content.scenarioHint: 你和一位新认识的朋友在咖啡馆闲聊，对方提到喜欢旅行，你自然地想了解他的家乡和他从小养成的爱好。
content.speakerText: What's your hometown like, and did you have any special hobbies growing up?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的家乡怎么样？小时候有什么特别的爱好吗？
expectedAnswers: I'm from Xi'an — it's full of history, and I used to practice calligraphy every weekend.
I grew up in Kunming, known as the Spring City. I loved hiking in the mountains after school.
My hometown is Qingdao. I spent a lot of time by the beach, surfing and eating fresh seafood.
I'm from Nanjing. I used to play badminton with my grandpa in the park — it's my favorite memory.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回答了家乡特点和童年爱好
语言准确性：语法正确，时态使用恰当（如used to）
表达自然度：是否使用了生活化、有温度的表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含hometown, hobby, growing up等关键词

content.scenarioHint: 在一次国际文化交流活动中，你听到对方说他喜欢慢生活，你想进一步了解他的家乡如何影响了他的生活方式和兴趣。
content.speakerText: How did your hometown shape the way you relax or spend your free time?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的家乡是如何影响你放松或度过空闲时间的方式的？
expectedAnswers: I'm from Luoyang — the quiet temples and tea houses taught me to slow down and appreciate stillness.
My town is small and coastal, so I learned to unwind by walking along the shore at sunset.
I’m from Chongqing — the spicy food and late-night hotpot nights made me love social, laid-back vibes.
Growing up in Suzhou, I picked up traditional paper-cutting as a way to calm my mind — it’s still my go-to hobby.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否连接了家乡环境与个人休闲方式的因果关系
语言准确性：使用恰当的连接结构（e.g., 'taught me to', 'made me love'）
表达自然度：是否避免机械回答，展现个人情感与细节
关键词覆盖：是否包含hometown, relax, free time, hobby等关键词
